name: Carapace Security Monitor
description: Runtime behavior monitoring, dangerous command detection, and anomaly alerting for OpenClaw agents.

blockOnCritical.description: Block (not just alert) on critical security violations

alertWebhook.description: Webhook URL for sending security alerts (Slack, Discord, etc.)

logFile.description: Path to write security event logs (JSON lines format)

sensitivePathPatterns.description: Additional glob patterns for sensitive file paths

blockedDomains.description: Domains that should trigger an alert when accessed

maxToolCallsPerMinute.description: Maximum tool calls per minute before rate alert

enableBaseline.description: Enable behavioral baseline learning and anomaly detection

trustedSkills.description: Skills to skip baseline alerts for

blockOnCritical.label: Block Critical Threats
blockOnCritical.help: When enabled, Carapace will block tool calls that match critical threat patterns (e.g., curl|bash, SSH key theft). When disabled, it will only alert.

alertWebhook.label: Alert Webhook URL
alertWebhook.help: POST alerts as JSON to this URL. Compatible with Slack, Discord, and custom webhooks.

licenseKey.label: License Key
licenseKey.help: Enter your Carapace Pro or Enterprise license key to unlock advanced features.
